sortStatus: Highest rating clicked before scrape; resulting reviews are top visible written reviews after Highest sort.

reviews.reviewText:
Tried this breakfast/lunch venue for the first time this past late March prior to taking our boys to Legoland during my older son's spring break week.

Nothing super fancy but just good ol' traditional American home cooking in a spacious dining area that's kept clean with friendly welcoming service.

Good food at still reasonable prices and my kind of family restaurant. We live pretty far northeast in Beach Park up in Lake Co but are in Schaumburg a few times a year particularly in the Woodfield area.

If ever doing another family outing in the area and decide on brunch beforehand, Maxfield's is a must. Hope for several more years of boomin' business to come for the owner(s).
reviews.additionalDetails:
Meal type
Brunch
Price per person
$10–20
Food: 4
Service: 5
Atmosphere: 5
Noise level
Moderate noise
Group size
5-8 people

reviews.reviewText: My daughter and I had breakfast here for the first time, and honestly, we loved it! The environment was very clean and tidy, the waiters were very friendly, and the food came quickly. The French toast and waffles we ordered were absolutely delicious! Oh, and the coffee was great, too! My daughter said she hopes to come back; she loves it!

reviews.reviewText: We stopped in for a late breakfast on a Tuesday. The service was great, and the food was amazing. I ordered the country skillet with pancakes and she had apple cinnamon crepes. My eggs were over easy and perfect. What more can I say, this place makes great food all the time

reviews.reviewText: I've been to this restaurant in the past but I decided to stop by for breakfast today before going to a dental appointment. As I walked in I was greeted and taken to a booth with plenty of room. The waitress came right away and asked if I wanted a beverage and came back with my coffee and flavored creamers that I asked for. I ordered and it came out in a satisfactory amount of time. Well cooked and tasted great. I had a wonderful experience and will return. I recommend this place to anyone. :-)
reviews.additionalDetails:
Order type
Dine in
Meal type
